title: 2022 DfT RPC Opinions
body: "Department for Transport measures  Motor Vehicles (Amendment) Regulations 2021  The Transport Strikes (Minimum Service Levels) Bill  Regulation to Implement the International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) Non-Volatile Particulate Matter (nvPM) Aircraft Engine Emissions Standards  Measures to address shortage of HGV drivers – removal of car and trailer (B+E) tests  Improving the consumer experience at chargepoints "
